name: scroll-area
description: A scrollable viewport with a styled, token-driven scrollbar overlay (Radix scroll-area structure); native scrolling, keyboard, wheel and touch are preserved, the custom thumb is drag- and track-page-able. Vertical, horizontal, or both.
docs: Register <lv-scroll-area> by importing components/ui/scroll-area.ts from your entry point. Give the element a fixed width/height and put the overflowing content inside its default slot. Set `orientation` to 'vertical' (default) | 'horizontal' | 'both', and `type` to 'hover' (default) | 'scroll' | 'always' to control when the bars appear.
